1: Out of the depths have I cried unto thee, O LORD LORD .
2: To the voice of my supplications.
5: And in his word do I hope.
6: More than they that watch for the morning: I say, more than I say, more than they that watch for the morning.
7: And with him is is plenteous redemption.
8: And he shall redeem Israel from all his iniquities.
